notes:
I've created a bright, conversion-ready homepage for your direct-to-consumer footwear brand. 

Key features include:
- **A friendly Hero Section** with a primary CTA to grab attention.
- **Split Audience CTAs** for Men and Women for easy navigation.
- **Named Collection Modules** to highlight specific product lines.
- **A Best-Sellers Shelf** for featured products.
- **Benefit-led Copy Blocks** on comfort and sustainability.

The design is optimized for conversion with a clean, easy-to-browse layout that feels approachable and modern. I've also created and added the corresponding design system to the canvas.
prompt: Create a direct-to-consumer footwear ecommerce homepage with a friendly hero, split audience CTAs, named collection modules, best-seller shelves, and short benefit-led copy blocks about comfort and sustainability. Keep the layout bright, easy to browse, and conversion-ready.
suggestions: Add a mobile version of the homepage
Create a product detail page for a sneaker
Update the color palette to be more earthy
title: Footwear Brand Homepage
